headline: Invesco Increases Optionality of its BulletShares Defined Maturity ETF Suite by adding Treasury Bond ETFs
summary: Invesco Ltd. (NYSE: IVZ), a leading global asset management firm, today announced the launch of BulletShares® Treasury Bond ETFs, marking a significant expansion of its defined maturity ETF platform and reinforcing its leadership1 in the defined maturity ETF landscape.
